S

setInfo(Informations) - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Sets the Informations object for this KnowledgeKeeper.
setPlayer(String) - Static method in class home.Home
Sets the current player by username.
setPlayerX(int) - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Sets the player's X coordinate.
setQuest(Questions) - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Sets the Questions object for this KnowledgeKeeper.
shot_boxes - package shot_boxes
 
shot_boxes.informations - package shot_boxes.informations
 
shot_boxes.questions - package shot_boxes.questions
 
ShotBoxes - Interface in shot_boxes
The ShotBoxes interface defines the structure for shotbox objects in the game that represent either questions or informational items.
showErrorDialog(String) - Static method in class authentication.Authentication
Displays an error message dialog with the given message.
showScoreboard() - Static method in class home.Home
Displays the scoreboard dialog with sorted scores.
SL - Class in knowledge_keepers
Represents a Section Leader (SL) entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
SL(String, File) - Constructor for class knowledge_keepers.SL
Constructs an SL instance with the specified name and image.
speeds - Static variable in interface shot_boxes.ShotBoxes
 
startAttack() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Starts attack action.
startAttack() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.Professor
Starts the attack timer.
startAttack() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.SL
Starts the attack timer for SL.
startAttack() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.TA
Starts the attack timer for TA.
switchScreen(String) - Static method in class main.MainGUI
Switches the currently displayed screen to the chosen panel.
